response.justification: Candidate has strong general software engineering experience across web, mobile, and some embedded/low-level work, but lacks the hard requirements for this role: no native Japanese language proficiency listed (only English, Romanian, basic German), no demonstrated C-on-UNIX embedded firmware experience for LAN switches, no Linux kernel source modification work, and no security/networking domain experience (MACsec, 802.1X, L2/L3 switching, NETCONF, SNMP). Background skews toward TypeScript/Node.js and DLang web/data services rather than embedded network security.
strengths: Long software engineering career with breadth across languages including C/C++ exposure at National Instruments
Linux familiarity and some low-level/systems work (audio server, DLang microservices)
Strong testing and software craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD, workshops)
concerns: No native Japanese proficiency — a hard requirement explicitly stated
No embedded firmware, LAN-switch, or chip-vendor SDK experience
No demonstrated security-stack experience (MACsec, 802.1X, encryption, tamper detection) or Linux kernel modification

key_factors.factor: No embedded networking / switch firmware background
No security domain experience (MACsec, 802.1X, kernel security)
